{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

{{< include _subfiles/defs/_def-odds.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/defs/_def_conditional_odds.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/exm/_exm-odds.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/exr/_exr-odds.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec_odds_fn.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/thms/_thm_est_odds_shortcut.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/thms/_thm_odds_simplified.qmd >}}

---

{{< include _subfiles/thms/_thm_odds_nonevent.qmd >}}

---

#### Odds of rare events

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec_odds_of_rare_events.qmd >}}
